headline: EQT Rises 14.6% in a Year: Should Investors Bet on the Stock?
summary: EQT shares climb 14.6% in a year as its integrated model and rising gas demand boost prospects, but commodity volatility may temper investor enthusiasm.

headline: Ahead of EQT's Q1 Earnings: Should Investors Jump in or Avoid?
summary: EQT heads into Q1 earnings with strong EPS and revenue growth forecasts, but the setup favors holding, not buying yet, despite a valuation discount.

headline: Countdown to EQT (EQT) Q1 Earnings: Wall Street Forecasts for Key Metrics
summary: Evaluate the expected performance of EQT (EQT) for the quarter ended March 2026, looking beyond the conventional Wall Street top-and-bottom-line estimates and examining some of its key metrics for better insight.
